title: Mega Shine (B2b) release: Card list, Events, Solo Battles

upcoming_events.name: Mega Shine Emblem Event
upcoming_events.description: March 28: Mega Shine Emblem Event. Collect emblems and various rewards by winning PvP matches.

upcoming_events.name: Monthly Premium Shop Update
upcoming_events.description: April 1: Monthly Premium Shop Update. The premium accessories are themed around Mega Gengar. The log-in reward for Premium Pass holders is Chien-Pao ex (alternative artwork from Paldean Wonders).

upcoming_events.name: Bonus Week Missions
upcoming_events.description: April 4: Bonus Week Missions. For a week, several missions will be available. Completing them will reward you with Pack Hourglasses, Shinedust and Shop Tickets. Even more missions & rewards have been added!

upcoming_events.name: Slowpoke Drop event
upcoming_events.description: April 9: Slowpoke Drop event. Get an exclusive Art Rare Slowpoke and exclusive Electrike and Varoom, as well as alternative artworks for Haxorus and Chatot in this Solo Battle event.

upcoming_events.name: ranked Match Season 12 (B2b)
upcoming_events.description: April 13: The ranked Match Season 12 (B2b) starts! The twelfth season of ranked will last until April 27.

upcoming_events.name: Gastly and Wigglytuff Wonderpick
upcoming_events.description: April 17: Gastly and Wigglytuff Wonderpick. A Wonder Pick event where you can get Promo Gastly, Promo Wigglytuff and Kangaskhan themed accessories in exchange of Event Shop Tickets (Kangaskhan).

upcoming_events.name: B3
upcoming_events.description: The next set B3 will be released on April 28.
